title: Roger Jackson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person
|image=[[File:Roger_L._Jackson.jpg]]
|name=Roger Jackson
|birth=[[July 13]], [[1950s#1956|1956]], Atlanta, Georgia, U.S.
|death=
|listedpronouns=<!--Only include pronouns if they have been explicitly specified by the individual to which this article pertains.-->
|nationality=American
|occupation=Voice actor
|companies=
|website=
}}
'''Roger L. Jackson''' (born [[July 13]], [[1950s#1956|1956]]) is a voice actor, best known as the voice of [[W:c:scream:Ghostface|Ghostface]] from the ''[[W:c:scream:Scream (franchise)|Scream]]'' films and as the villain [[W:c:powerpuffgirls:Mojo Jojo (1998 TV series)|Mojo-Jojo]] from ''[[W:c:powerpuffgirls:The Powerpuff Girls (1998 TV series)|The Powerpuff Girls]]''.

He has provided voices for several ''Star Wars'' video and computer games, most notably providing the voice of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its expansion pack.

==Works==
===Gameography===
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Roger Jackson}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' – Computer, [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' – [[Ka'Pa]] The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], Imperial Commander, [[Kaerobani]], Rebel Officer 2, [[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]], Tusken, Rodian
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] – [[Ark Roose/Legends|Ark Roose]], [[Ebe E. Endocott/Legends|Ebe Endocott]]
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[Echuu Shen-Jon]], Jedi Padawan, [[Mahwi Lihnn]]
**[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds#Expansion set: Clone Campaigns|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns'']] – [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] pilot, Echuu Shen-Jon, Rebel Trooper
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' – [[Smeer Ze-Trios]], [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|RSF]] [[Officer/Legends|Officer]]
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' – [[Kraid Nemmeso]]
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' – Captain [[Orsai]], Generic Toth Pilot 1, Nym Ground Unit
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' – Imperial Worker 1, Rebel Shock Troop 1
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' – Imperial Worker, Rebel Informant
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' – Additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' – Automated Ship Voice, Clone trooper Lieutenant, [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]], Gunship Pilot
